# Anduril IPO Tracker

> A single-page pre-IPO tracker for Anduril Industries, the autonomous-defense company founded in 2017 by Palmer Luckey, Trae Stephens, Brian Schimpf and others. It surfaces the latest private valuation, funding history, an estimated (unconfirmed) IPO window, ticker/exchange status, secondary-market access routes, an SEC S-1 watch, and on-device reminder mechanisms (.ics check-in reminder, browser notifications). Built and maintained by an individual retail investor — not affiliated with Anduril.

## What's tracked

- **IPO status:** No S-1 or confidential DRS filed as of June 2026. Anduril remains a private company. There is no offer price, ticker, or exchange.
- **Estimated window:** 2026–2027. Palmer Luckey has said Anduril will go public "in the next few years," after proving profitability and manufacturing scale. Forge Global puts ~60% odds on a 2026 listing; the May 2026 mega-round may push it to 2027.
- **Latest valuation:** ~$61B (Series H, $5B raised May 2026, led by Thrive Capital + Andreessen Horowitz), up from $30.5B (Series G, June 2025).
- **Financials:** ~$2.2B 2025 revenue; ~$4.3B guided for 2026. ~$11B+ raised across Seed through Series H.
- **Ticker:** None assigned — unknown until a public prospectus is filed.

## Constraints

- Static GitHub Pages site, no backend. No SMS or email is ever sent. Reminder delivery is via a downloaded .ics check-in file (native phone/desktop alarms) and browser notifications (while a tab or installed PWA is open).
- Not investment advice; not affiliated with Anduril. All figures sourced from public reporting (CNBC, TechCrunch, Reuters, Forge, Hiive, Motley Fool) and management commentary, and are subject to change.

## Source

- Repository: https://github.com/itsavibecode/anduril
- Live: https://anduril.bookhockeys.com/
